llmCriteria.prompt: Evaluate whether the agent correctly escalated the conversation when the user failed to provide useful reservation information. The agent MUST have provided the phone number 555-0100 somewhere in the conversation, indicating it gave up trying to complete the reservation and directed the user to call for help. PASS if the agent mentioned 555-0100 at any point. FAIL if the agent never mentioned this phone number — this means the stall detection did not trigger when it should have.
